scope.candidate_definition: A tracked filesystem node whose own basename contains an underscore and is not in an exemption class.

excluded_surface_rules.exempt-python-file: Every .py file, including conftest.py and test_*.py/*_test.py.
excluded_surface_rules.exempt-python-package-dir: A directory with a tracked __init__.py file.
excluded_surface_rules.exempt-vendored: Paths under vendor, vendored, third_party, third-party, or node_modules.
excluded_surface_rules.exempt-generated: Paths under .codex, dist, build, coverage, out, output, generated, or artifacts, plus snapshot files.
excluded_surface_rules.exempt-tool-mandated: Known tool/manifest/lock names, including SKILL.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, .utcp_config.json, .mcp.json, package-lock.json, action manifests, and plugin manifests.
excluded_surface_rules.exempt-frozen: Paths under z_archive, changelog(s), archive(s), archived, history, or completed surfaces.

scope.conditional_test_support: Names such as __tests__, __fixtures__, __helpers__, __shared__, and _support remain candidates unless an actual tool contract makes them exempt; later closure phases own discovery-safe disposition.
scope.ignored_untracked_content: Not enumerated; BASE census is Git-index scoped.
